motions.title: Council Approves Lease Extension for Key EMS Storage Facility
motions.summary: Essex County Council approved extending the lease for the Essex-Windsor EMS facility on Erie Street East until 2022. This large facility is crucial for storing supplies, vehicles, and equipment to support emergency services in the region.
motions.full_text: That the Lease Amendment and Extension, pertaining to the property municipally know as 400 Erie Street East, Windsor be approved and that Essex Council adopt By-Law #43-2019 authorizing the Warden and the Clerk to execute the agreement on behalf of the Corporation of the County of Essex.

motions.title: Land Acquired for New Roundabout at County Road 11 and South Talbot
motions.summary: Council authorized the acquisition of land, including potentially through expropriation, to build a new roundabout at the intersection of County Road 11 (Walker Road) and South Talbot. This project aims to improve traffic flow and safety for commuters.
motions.full_text: That Essex County Council adopt By-Law Number 41-2019 authorizing Administration to commence the Expropriation Process to acquire lands required to undertake the reconstruction of the intersection of County Road 11 (Walker Road) and South Talbot with a roundabout, which lands required are identified as Parts 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7 and 8; And further that Council adopt By-Law Number 42-2019, authorizing Administration to proceed with the Agreement of Purchase and Sale of lands for the three (3) parcels.

motions.title: County Waives Repayment for SWIFT Rural Broadband Project
motions.summary: To support the expansion of high-speed internet in rural areas, County Council decided to waive its right to be repaid for its initial investment in the Southwestern Integrated Fibre Technology (SWIFT) project. This decision aims to accelerate broadband infrastructure development for underserved communities.
motions.full_text: That County Council waive its right to repayment of its SWIFT refundable allocation as set forth Appendix A of Report Number 2019-1016-ADM-R016-RM.
